description: List of pledges arranged in two sections, separated by a blank space. Thirteen donations are in the first group and ten in the second; two contributions are for ten dirhams while the other amounts range from one to five and one/half dirhams. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society 2:488) EMS
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
